Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 619}Oh, it's the Dream Team. Sheesh, you guys are always together. What's up?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 619}Hold on... You're not really going to Port Island Station right now, are you!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 619}Haven't you heard the reports!? It's super unsafe![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 619}My friend's friend's classmate was found knocked out in the back alley.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 619}And your uniforms would make you stand out... You could get into some serious trouble there.[n]{f 1 1}
